hooks.command: osascript -e 'display notification "Claude Code needs your attention" with title "Claude Code"'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty"); if [[ "$FILE" == *".env"* ]] || [[ "$FILE" == *".secrets"* ]] || [[ "$FILE" == *"credentials"* ]]; then echo "BLOCKED: $FILE is a protected sensitive file" >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0'
